description_long: This hat features a soft, draped white fabric forming a loose, cylindrical crown that gently tapers and folds at the base. The crown is topped with a flat, slightly hexagonal surface, giving it a structured yet relaxed appearance. Around the base of the crown, a prominent, gold-colored band encircles the hat, adding a touch of contrast and visual interest. The band is thick and angular, with a subtle beveled edge that enhances its dimensionality. The fabric below the band appears to hang loosely, suggesting a comfortable fit and a traditional, utilitarian design. The overall style is reminiscent of a keffiyeh or ghutrah, commonly worn in Middle Eastern urban environments.
description: A white, draped fabric hat with a flat top and a thick gold band encircling the crown, resembling a traditional Middle Eastern keffiyeh or ghutrah.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat-topped crown and the gold band encircling the hat, with the white fabric draping smoothly below.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the angular, beveled gold band and the way the fabric tapers and folds at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the open drape of the fabric, with the gold band maintaining its prominence and the crown's flat top visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the asymmetrical draping of the fabric and the continuous gold band around the crown.
